title: Why Googleâs Olympics 2024 ad went viral for all the wrong reasons and what the company said on the controversy - Times of India
description: TECH NEWS : Google's recent ad featuring its AI chatbot, Gemini, faced backlash for its portrayal during the Olympics. The commercial showed a father using Gemini
